Author: pi

Log:
  New port: graphics/llpp

  llpp is a graphical PDF viewer which aims to superficially resemble
  less(1).

  WWW: http://repo.or.cz/llpp.git/

  PR:		206006
  Submitted by:	Tobias Kortkamp <t@tobik.me>
